/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/example/sync_example.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/cloud/provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/cloud/http_provider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/cloud/transaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/network/http_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/network/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/network/connection_mannager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/network/http_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/network/http_response.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/network/message_result.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/network/original_message.cpp.o CMakeFiles/simple_download.dir/src/network/http_helper.cpp.o -o simple_download  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread
